summary: The user is working on a project analyzing customer data to identify trends and patterns, considering k-means clustering but unsure about the optimal number of clusters. They have experience in data analysis from a Marketing Research class project and are exploring data visualization techniques to aid their analysis.
facts: The user is working on a project that involves analyzing customer data to identify trends and patterns. The user has experience with data analysis from a Marketing Research class project, where they led the data analysis team for a comprehensive market analysis for a new product launch. The user plans to use k-means clustering initially but is unsure about the number of clusters. The user intends to start with the elbow method and silhouette analysis to determine the optimal number of clusters. The user is considering using scatter plots and heatmaps to visualize relationships between customer features. The user wants to try dimensionality reduction techniques like PCA or t-SNE to identify clusters or patterns in high-dimensional data. The user has experience with data visualization from their Marketing Research class project, where they created reports and presentations to communicate findings to stakeholders. The user is exploring color schemes and visual encoding techniques to enhance the effectiveness of their visualizations.
